pages.text: $(italic)Biomancy$() is the craft of working with living tissue — harvesting it, feeding it, shaping it into tools, machines, and creatures that are themselves alive.$(br2)The mod meant to ship a guide of its own, an in-game book called the $(flesh)Primordial Index$(). That book was never finished. The item still exists in Novus, but it opens nothing.
pages.title: The Wetware Appendix

pages.text: This is its replacement — the $(flesh)Wetware Appendix$() — a proper guide so the craft is no longer something you piece together from the recipe viewer alone.$(br2)Read $(l:1_harvest/flesh_plunderer)The Harvest$() and $(l:2_cradle/core)The Primordial Cradle$() in order; everything past that point depends on them. The later chapters can be skimmed as you reach for each system.

$(bold)A note on tone.$() Biomancy is body-horror by design — the blocks bleed, the machines have teeth, the chests bite strangers. Nothing here is broken; it is meant to unsettle. If a thing looks alive, treat it as alive.
pages.title: On the Craft
